privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Unsplash image URLs (verified as valid HTTP resources with pixel dimensions 800x533 and 800x477). However, contrary to the task description claiming 'underexposed images,' both Unsplash sources have mean brightness values of ~103-110 out of 255, which are not underexposed (typically <100 is considered underexposed). The task includes an ImageMagick synthetic fallback for download failures. The verifier logic specifies thresholds: ≥15% contrast improvement, >0.05 histogram spread improvement, and >10% of pixels with >20 intensity change. No explicit 'metadata' field exists in task.json, making this a zero-metadata task.
